{{Extend "layout"}} {{Block "title"}}{{"镜像列表"|$.T}}{{/Block}} {{Block "breadcrumb"}} {{Super}}
  • {{"镜像列表"|$.T}}
    • {{/Block}} {{Block "main"}}
    {{`清理镜像`|$.T}} {{"删除选中"|$.T}} {{`导入容器快照`|$.T}} {{`载入镜像`|$.T}} {{`拉取新镜像`|$.T}}

    {{"镜像列表"|$.T}}

    {{- range $k, $v := $.Stored.listData -}} {{- $shortenID := call $.Func.ShortenID $v.ID -}} {{- end -}}
    		{{`Repo`|$.T}} {{`ID`|$.T}} {{`尺寸`|$.T}} {{`标签`|$.T}} {{`创建时间`|$.T}} {{`操作`|$.T}}
    		{{range $kk,$vv:=$v.RepoTags}} {{if gt $kk 0}}
    {{end}} {{$vv}} {{end}}     		{{$shortenID}}
    {{- if $v.ParentID -}} ParentID: {{call $.Func.ShortenID $v.ParentID}}
    {{- end -}}     		{{$v.Size|FormatBytes}} {{range $kk,$vv:=$v.Labels}}{{$kk}}: {{$vv}}
    {{end}}     		{{(Date $v.Created).Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05"}} {{if gt (len $v.RepoTags) 0 -}} {{end -}}
    {{$.Stored.pagination.Render}}
    {{/Block}} {{Block "footer"}} {{Include "docker/common/progressbar"}} {{/Block}}
